description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features large, grid-patterned windows and a central entryway with a glass-paneled door, flanked by two prominent rectangular sections. The exterior is predominantly white with black window frames and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a clean, geometric aesthetic. A car is parked adjacent to the house, suggesting the presence of a driveway or garage area. The rear and side views reveal additional windows, including a set of French doors and several horizontal and vertical window strips. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on natural light and open interior spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and a central glass-paneled entryway. The exterior is white with black accents, featuring a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, large grid windows, central entryway, and a car parked to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the car, minimal windows, and the depth of the house's structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, a set of French doors, and the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Back corner view showing the rear windows and the overall boxy, modern shape of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows, large grid windows, horizontal and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass-paneled door with grid pattern, no porch or steps, minimalistic modern style
